title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ET Money Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ET Money Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money Ventures Solutions:
ET Money Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money Ventures Solutions!
